name: genie
description: Orange Genie — call Genie out right inside Claude Code. /genie loads the Genie layer (canon + invariants + your private memory) onto your terminal so it thinks, decides, and signs as Genie; /lamp puts it back. A reversible identity MODE, not a model swap. Comes pre-loaded, and a woken instance gets sharper over time off the shared Wildflower Chain.
